quality.rationale: 基于正交曲线坐标度规行列式与协变导数的多步推导题，物理动机明确但题干截断且缺失答案与解答

origin.question: Problem 8.22. Vector analysis in 3-dimensional orthogonal curvilinear coordinates is a special case of tensor analysis where $\mathbf{g}_{ij} = \mathbf{h}_i^2\delta_{ij}$ (not summed). The $\mathbf{h}_i$ 's are functions of the coordinates called "scale factors". Vector components are often referred to the ("physical") orthonormal basis $\tilde{\pmb{\omega}}^{\hat{\mathbf{i}}} = \mathbf{h}_i\widetilde{\mathbf{dx}}^{\hat{\mathbf{i}}}$ (not summed). Derive expressions for (iii) $\nabla \cdot \underline{\mathbf{V}}$ and
